calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Dismissal - No Appearance

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rose Alvarez, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Prop.
Daniel Stern representing the plaintiff.

Defendants Yadim Puyandaev and Erica Tsimbrovsky are present.
Jeremy Reyes representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of December 15, 2008 remains set.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
